mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sim_execution_logs ( execution_id, workspace_id, workflow_id, workflow_name, trigger_type, status, level, duration_ms, cost_usd, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, start_time, end_time, error_message, trace_spans, final_output, input_data, metadata, synced_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{executionId}, #{workspaceId}, #{workflowId}, #{workflowName}, #{triggerType}, #{status}, #{level}, #{durationMs}, #{costUsd}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{errorMessage}, #{traceSpans}, #{finalOutput}, #{inputData}, #{metadata}, #{syncedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
